fields.label: Owner Name
fields.description: Full name as per the registered document

fields.label: Owner Type
fields.options:
Individual
Joint
HUF
Company
Trust
Government
Society
fields.description: Legal entity type of the owner

fields.label: Co-Owner Names
fields.description: For joint ownership — list all co-owners, one per line

fields.label: Acquisition Mode
fields.options:
Sale
Gift
Inheritance
Partition
Court Decree
Government Allotment
Power of Attorney
Release
Exchange
Adverse Possession
fields.description: How this owner acquired the land

fields.label: Ownership From
fields.description: Date of acquisition — usually the registration date of the deed

fields.label: Ownership To
fields.description: Date ownership ended. Leave BLANK for the current owner.

fields.label: Chain Status
fields.description: Auto-computed: indicates whether this ownership link has chain issues

fields.label: Registration Number
fields.description: Document registration number at the Sub-Registrar Office (SRO)

fields.label: Registration Date
fields.description: Date of registration at SRO — may differ from deed execution date

fields.label: Registration Office
fields.description: Sub-Registrar Office where the document was registered (e.g., SRO Shamshabad)

fields.label: Consideration Amount
fields.description: Sale value or declared market value as per the registered document

fields.label: Stamp Duty Paid
fields.description: Stamp duty amount — used for revenue verification and valuation cross-check

fields.label: Source Document Row #
fields.description: Row number in the Land Documents table that this ownership record was derived from (for cross-reference)

fields.label: Remarks
fields.description: Legal notes — chain gaps, disputed claims, special conditions, advocate observations

name: Ownership Record
description: Title chain register — each row represents one ownership period, forming the complete chain of title from original allottee to current owner.
